welcome.headline: Your Home in Tyrol
welcome.text: Haus Stubenböck is quietly and centrally located in Telfs, just 25 kilometres west of Innsbruck. Maria Verena Stubenböck and her family warmly welcome you to their family-run guesthouse.

rooms.headline: Our Rooms
rooms.subline: Comfortably furnished rooms for every need

einzelzimmer.name: Single Room
einzelzimmer.desc: Perfect for solo travellers. Quiet location with everything you need.

doppelzimmer.name: Double Room
doppelzimmer.desc: Cosy room for couples or two travellers with balcony access.

mehrbettzimmer.name: Multi-bed Room
mehrbettzimmer.desc: Ideal for groups or contractors. Shared kitchen included.

sustainability.headline: Sustainable, Organic & Family-run
sustainability.text: We operate consciously and sustainably. Our own fruit and vegetable garden provides seasonal produce, we source regional food, and handle resources with care.

booking.headline: Book a Room
booking.subline: Send a request — we confirm personally
booking.name: Full Name
booking.successText: We will get back to you shortly. You will receive a confirmation by email.
booking.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
booking.bookedWarning: Some dates are already booked. Please check your selection.

directions.headline: Directions
directions.bycarText: From Innsbruck via the A12 motorway towards Bregenz, exit Telfs. Approx. 25 minutes.
directions.bytrainText: Regular bus service from Innsbruck to Telfs (line 4140). From Telfs station approx. 10 minutes walk.

contact.headline: Contact
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Message sent! We will reply as soon as possible.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

confirm.headline: Booking Confirmed
confirm.text: The booking has been successfully confirmed. The guest will receive a confirmation email.
confirm.alreadyHandled: This booking has already been handled.

reject.headline: Booking Rejected
reject.text: The booking has been rejected. The guest will receive a cancellation email.
reject.alreadyHandled: This booking has already been handled.
